untranslatable_reason: Double Bottom pattern detection requires identifying two distinct local minima with specific shape characteristics (wide rounded 'Eve' bottoms, not V-shaped or spikes), measuring valley-to-peak rise of 10%, and validating bottom-to-bottom price variation within ~1%. These multi-bar pattern recognition and shape analysis requirements cannot be expressed using only point-in-time indicator values and simple comparison operators. Pattern detection requires historical bar sequence analysis and geometric validation beyond the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy rules: Entry uses close above SMA-20 (downtrend reversal) and RSI < 50 (not yet overbought). Exit uses close below SMA-20 (trend reversal). However, these do not capture the core pattern logic: identifying two rounded bottoms at similar levels, validating 10% rise between them, and confirming bottom shape characteristics. The signal requires a custom pattern detection function or candlestick pattern library to properly implement.
